title: DecisionVote
description: A committee member's vote on a specific design decision point raised during deliberation.

voter_id.description: ID of the voting committee member (e.g. committee-1)

decision_id.description: Unique ID of the decision point being voted on (e.g. d1, d2)

question.description: The decision question as presented to the committee

options_presented.description: All options that were presented for this decision

chosen_option.description: The option this voter selected (must match one of options_presented)

confidence.description: Voter's confidence in their choice (0.0 = uncertain, 1.0 = certain)

reasoning.description: 1-3 sentence explanation of why this option was chosen

concerns.description: Any concerns or caveats about the chosen option

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this vote was cast
